feed.title: grace.hylandd
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from grace.hylandd

entry.title: I wish I could go back and hug her and tell her everything will be okay. However, her thinking that everything won’t be okay is what gave her the drive to elevate and escape her miserable life. Maybe its best if I just let her suffer.
entry.content: I wish I could go back and hug her and tell her everything will be okay. However, her thinking that everything won’t be okay is what gave her the drive to elevate and escape her miserable life. Maybe its best if I just let her suffer.

entry.title: Someone teach me how to twerrrrk 🔮🌙
entry.content: Someone teach me how to twerrrrk 🔮🌙

entry.title: PSA: When you know you need to get out of a toxic situation, but life on your own seems way scarier, building your independence back up is the key to freedom!
entry.content: PSA: When you know you need to get out of a toxic situation, but life on your own seems way scarier, building your independence back up is the key to freedom!
